description: A candid action photograph of three children running in a footrace on the paved driveway in front of the White House South Portico. Two boys (one in a navy shirt and black shorts, one in a red shirt and black shorts) and a girl with blonde hair in a red shirt, black shorts, and bright pink running shoes are caught mid-stride, arms pumping. The neoclassical White House facade with its curved columned portico, the gold presidential seal mounted on the balcony railing, an American flag, manicured shrubs, and a black iron railing form the backdrop in bright sunlight. There is no on-image text or graphic overlay. The White House posted it within its 'Reviving the Presidential Fitness Test' and National Physical Fitness and Sports Month series.
